seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs, and must include at least five uppercase words.
new_constraint: Each paragraph contains no more than one uppercase word.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs, and must include at least five uppercase words. Each paragraph contains no more than one uppercase word.
response:
Subject: Introduction - [Your Name] - [Course Name]

dear professor [professor's last name],

my name is [your name] and i am a new student in your [course name] class this semester. i am genuinely EXCITED to be learning about [mention a specific topic from the course] with you. i have always been deeply interested in [your field of study or interest], and i am really looking forward to your insights into this subject.

my academic goal is to eventually pursue a career in [your career field], where i hope to make a SIGNIFICANT contribution to [a specific area within that field]. i believe that the knowledge i gain from your course, particularly concerning [mention a specific course concept], will be FUNDAMENTAL to achieving that ambition.

i am a very motivated and eager learner, and i promise to be a diligent participant in class discussions and assignments. if there are any opportunities for extra help or if you recommend any further reading on this subject, i would be VERY grateful. thank you for your time and consideration.

sincerely,

[your name]
[your student id number]<turn|>
